title: Changes in Living Conditions of Families with Children in 1990s Finland 1996
description: The archived data consist of family interviews about changes in the lives of families with children in Finland in the 1990s. The interviews were conducted with parents and children in Tampere and Jyväskylä regions in 1996. Views were probed on the structure of the family, living conditions, changes in the family in the 90s, leisure activities, social relationships, and future plans. The data include 59 interviews and 23 summaries with a total length of 1,342 pages. The dataset is only available
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
